category_sources: Official Nmap documentation describes Nmap as a network exploration and security auditing scanner.
source_facts.description says port scanning utility for large networks.
display_name_sources: Official website and documentation brand the project as Nmap.
docs_sources: Official Nmap book is described as the official guide.
Official Nmap docs page is a dedicated documentation index.
Official Nmap reference guide/manpage documents command usage.
repo_sources: Official Nmap download/book documentation identifies SVN as the source repository; GitHub nmap/nmap is described as a mirror.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched.
tags_sources: Official documentation describes network exploration, security auditing, and command-line reference usage.
